name: 06-23-split-agent-tests
title: 拆分 agent/tests.rs — 按域拆 4 个测试文件
description: agent/tests.rs 6547 行 30+ 个测试。拆出: (1) tests_cancellation.rs (9 个 cancel/oneshot/inflight), (2) tests_envelope.rs (5 个 tool_result_envelope), (3) tests_prompts.rs (11 个 system_prompt/synthetic_tool_result), (4) tests_agent_loop.rs (TestHarness + 9 个 agent_loop_* 集成测试)。测试可并行运行,git blame 噪音减少。
creator: Carlos-home
